name: MeleeAttack
description: A forceful close-range strike with weapon or strength alone. Ideal for warriors and barbarians who thrive in direct confrontation. The attack lands with visceral impact — the clash of steel, the thud of a heavy blow, or the crunch of armor splitting under sheer power.

name: SpellAttack
description: A spell-based offensive action channeling arcane or elemental energy. The caster focuses their will, conjuring a burst of destructive power — a blazing fireball, a crackling bolt of lightning, or a freezing ray of ice. It often forces the target to resist the caster’s magical influence.

name: RangedAttack
description: A precise long-range attack made using bows, crossbows, or thrown weapons. The attacker lines up a perfect shot from a distance — the arrow whistling through the air, the dart cutting silently toward its mark. It’s the art of speed, distance, and deadly accuracy.

name: Heal
description: A soothing touch or divine chant that restores life force. The caster channels restorative magic, mending wounds and easing pain. Light gathers around the target as vitality returns — a glimmer of hope amid the chaos of battle.

name: Flee
description: A desperate attempt to escape the fray. The combatant breaks away from danger, dodging strikes and seeking any opening to run. It’s a gamble between survival and pursuit — the rush of adrenaline, the pounding of footsteps, the taste of fear and freedom.
